name: mcp-prodago
description: MCP Server + AI Foundry Agent for Prodago Governance

scripts.prestart: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.deploy:infra: az deployment group create --resource-group rg-agent-prodago-ai2 --template-file infra/main.bicep --parameters infra/main.bicepparam
scripts.deploy:infra:preview: az deployment group what-if --resource-group rg-agent-prodago-ai2 --template-file infra/main.bicep --parameters infra/main.bicepparam
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:infra && npm run deploy && npm run deploy:agent
